info.name: AntLegal Law Firm Management System - Complete API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for AntLegal Law Firm Management System with all endpoints, authentication methods, and workflows.

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: All authentication endpoints including login, OTP, password management, and logout

request.description: Login using username/email and password. Returns authentication token.
Request OTP for phone number login. OTP valid for 10 minutes.
Request OTP for email login. OTP valid for 10 minutes.
Verify OTP and get authentication token. Maximum 5 attempts allowed.
Verify OTP and get authentication token. Maximum 5 attempts allowed.
Set password for users added by admin. Used for first-time password setup.
Logout current user and invalidate token.

item.name: 2. User Management
item.description: User registration, profile management, and user operations

request.description: Client self-registration endpoint. Creates a new client user account.
Add user to firm. Requires admin/super_admin/platform_owner permissions. User types: super_admin, admin, advocate, paralegal, client.
List all users. Results filtered based on user permissions.
Get details of a specific user.
Update user profile information.
Delete a user. Requires appropriate permissions.
Change password for logged-in user.
Switch active firm context for users who belong to multiple firms.
Create a new firm. Requires platform_owner or partner_manager permissions. Subscription types: trial, basic, professional, enterprise.
List all firms. Results filtered based on user permissions.
Get details of a specific firm.
Update firm details. Requires appropriate permissions.
Delete a firm. Requires platform_owner permissions.
List all branches for the current firm.
Create a new branch for the firm.
Get details of a specific branch.
Update branch details.
Delete a branch.

item.name: 4. Case Management
item.description: Endpoints for managing legal cases, hearings, and status updates

request.description: List all legal cases for the current firm.
List all active legal cases (excludes disposed and closed cases).
List all pre-litigation cases for the current firm.

body.raw:
{
  "case_title": "GreenWorld Land Acquisition",
  "case_number": "2026-RE-004",
  "category": "court_case",
  "case_type": "real estate",
  "status": "open",
  "priority": "low",
  "billing_type": "retainer",
  "estimated_value": 80000.00,
  "stage": "initial_consultation",
  "case_summary": "Acquisition of 50-acre conservation land parcel.",
  "total_fee": 50000.00,
  "hearing_fee": 1000.00,
  "additional_expenses": "At actuals",
  "payment_terms": "50% advance, balance on completion",
  "loe_notes": "Standard terms applied",
  "petitioner_name": "Linda Park",
  "respondent_name": "Opposing Party Name",
  "opposing_counsel": "John Doe Law Firm",
  "court_name": "Civil Court",
  "court_no": "No. 5",
  "judge_name": "Hon'ble Justice Smith",
  "district": "Bengaluru City",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "representing": "petitioner",
  "filing_date": "2024-04-11",
  "next_hearing_date": "2024-04-30T10:00:00Z",
  "client": "{{user_id}}",
  "assigned_advocate": "{{user_id}}"
}

request.description: Create a new legal case.
Get details of a specific case.
Update case status and add judgment details.
Schedule a new hearing for a case.

item.name: 5. Document Management
item.description: Endpoints for uploading and managing legal documents

request.description: List all documents accessible to the user.
Upload a new legal document. Supports multi-part form data.

item.name: 6. Join Links (Generic Invitation)
item.description: Endpoints for managing and using publicly shareable firm invitation links

request.description: Create a reusable invitation link for a firm. Returns a UUID to be used in public URLs.
Public endpoint to check link validity and get firm/role info before registration.
Public endpoint to register and join a firm via a reusable link.
Get role-specific statistics (Platform Owner, Partner Manager, or Firm Admin).

item.name: 8. Partners & Audit
item.description: Endpoints for partner management and system audit logs

request.description: List all strategic partners (Platform Owner only).
List system-wide audit logs. Results filtered by permissions.

item.name: 7. Client Management
item.description: Register clients, assign advocates, and manage client profiles.

request.description: Admin registers a new client. assigned_advocate_id is REQUIRED.
List all clients in your firm.
Returns all advocates in the firm for the dropdown.
Self-registered client picks an advocate after login.

item.name: 8. Generic Join Links
item.description: Reusable invite links. Admin creates link, shares URL, new users sign up through it.

request.description: Admin creates a reusable join link. max_uses=0 for unlimited.

item.name: Step 2 - Get Link Details (Public - No Auth)

request.description: PUBLIC. No auth. Frontend calls this when user opens the link. Returns firm_name, role, validity.

item.name: Step 3 - Join via Link (Public - No Auth)

request.description: PUBLIC. No auth. User fills form, submits. Returns auth token + user data.
List all join links for your firm.
